steps.title: Introduce the list
steps.content: The words before the blank form a complete clause: the poem contains three signature elements of Brooks's poetic style. The words after the blank list those elements.

steps.title: Use a colon for elaboration
steps.content: Choice A uses a comma where a list needs stronger introduction. Choice B makes Terse, compressed lines a fragment, and Choice C uses a semicolon before words that are not an independent clause. A colon correctly introduces the list of elements. The answer is D.
